title: OJCP Manifest
description: Schema for the /.well-known/ojcp.json manifest file that declares an OJCP-compliant provider's capabilities.

ojcp_version.description: The OJCP specification version this manifest conforms to.

provider.description: Information about the job context provider.

employer_id.description: Unique identifier for the employer or job board.

description.description: Brief description of the provider, suitable for agent context.

culture_context.description: Free-text description of company culture, useful for agent fit-scoring.

feed_endpoints.description: REST API endpoints for job data access.

detail.description: Endpoint template for fetching individual job details.

items.description: Standard tool names: search_jobs, get_job_detail, get_employer_context, begin_application, submit_application, check_application_status. Custom tools use namespaced names (e.g., acme:get_referral_link).

tools.description: List of OJCP tools supported by this provider. Includes standard tools and optionally provider-specific custom tools.

apply_paths.description: Application mechanisms supported by this provider.

auth.description: Authentication requirements for accessing this provider's tools.

required.description: Whether authentication is required to call any tools.

optional_scopes.description: Optional OAuth-style scopes that unlock additional capabilities.

rate_limits.description: Rate limiting policy for this provider. Providers MUST enforce these limits and return HTTP 429 (REST) or JSON-RPC error -32029 (MCP) when exceeded.

anonymous_rps.description: Maximum requests per second for unauthenticated clients.

authenticated_rps.description: Maximum requests per second for authenticated clients.

burst_limit.description: Maximum number of concurrent requests allowed before throttling.

verification_types.description: Types of verification this verifier supports.

required_for_paths.description: Apply path types that require this verifier.

supported_verifiers.description: Identity verification providers accepted by this OJCP provider.
